name: sdlc
description: SDLC harness: drives any project (greenfield or brownfield) through PRD -> User Stories -> UX design -> TRD -> Implementation -> Tests -> weighted-eval Review -> IaC/CI-CD, with file artifacts, human tollgates (incl. a deployment gate), sub-agents, hooks, NFR + UI/UX + IaC review dimensions, and a stack-agnostic runnable scorer.
